nameMeanings.name: Spendlove
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names В© Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname presumably for someone who was free with his affections, from Middle English spend(en) вҖҳ(to) spend or squanderвҖҷ (Old English spend(an)) + love вҖҳloveвҖҷ (Old English lufu).

variants.name: Spensley
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): probably a variant of Spendley, itself a variant of Spendlove , in which the consonant cluster /ndl/ has become pronounced /nsl/.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names В© Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from Д“ad вҖҳprosperity, richesвҖҷ + weard вҖҳguardвҖҷ. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002вҖ“66 ; ruled 1042вҖ“66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Spendlove was born in 1460, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Spendlove, was 31 and his mother, Joan Aignel, was 30. He married Alice Emme Bleckney. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1483, in his hometown, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Spendlove est nГ© en 1460, Г  Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son pГЁre, John Spendlove, avait 31 ans et sa mГЁre, Joan Aignel, avait 30 ans. Il a Г©pousГ© Alice Emme Bleckney. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est dГ©cГ©dГ© en 1483, dans sa ville natale, Г  lвҖҷГўge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Spendlove 1460 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Spendlove 31 und seine Mutter Joan Aignel 30. Er hat Alice Emme Bleckney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1483 im Alter von 23 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Spendlove ГЁ nato il nel 1460 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Spendlove, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Aignel, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Emme Bleckney. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. MorГ¬ nel 1483, nel sua cittadina, all'etГ  di 23 anni.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Spendlove nasceu em 1460, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Spendlove, tinha 31 anos e sua mГЈe, Joan Aignel, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Emme Bleckney. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: РҡРҫРіРҙР° Edward Spendlove СҖРҫРҙРёР»СҒСҸ РІ 1460 Рі. РІ РјРөСҒСӮРҪРҫСҒСӮРё СҒСғС„С„РҫР»Рә, РҗРҪРіР»РёСҸ, Р’РөР»РёРәРҫРұСҖРёСӮР°РҪРёСҸ, РөРіРҫ РҫСӮСҶСғ РҝРҫ РёРјРөРҪРё John Spendlove РұСӢР»Рҫ 31 РіРҫРҙ, Р° РјР°СӮРөСҖРё, РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСғСҺ Р·РІР°Р»Рё Joan Aignel, 30. РһРҪ Р¶РөРҪРёР»СҒСҸ РҪР° Р¶РөРҪСүРёРҪРө РҝРҫ РёРјРөРҪРё Alice Emme Bleckney. РЈ РҪРёС… РұСӢР» РҝРҫ РәСҖР°Р№РҪРөР№ РјРөСҖРө 1 СҒСӢРҪ Рё 1 РҙРҫСҮСҢ. РһРҪ СғРјРөСҖ РІ 1483 Рі. РІ РөРіРҫ СҖРҫРҙРҪРҫРј РіРҫСҖРҫРҙРө РІ РІРҫР·СҖР°СҒСӮРө 23 Р»РөСӮ.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Spendlove naciГі en 1460, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papГЎ, John Spendlove, tenГӯa 31 aГұos y su mamГЎ, Joan Aignel, tenГӯa 30 aГұos. Se casГі con Alice Emme Bleckney. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. MuriГі en 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 23 aГұos.
